titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Pierre Hohenberg, Deputy Provost for Science and Technology, Yale University, Records
Hohenberg (Pierre), Deputy Provost for Science and Technology, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday November 6, 2018 at 09:47
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Pierre Hohenberg, Deputy provost for science and technology, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of topical files maintained by Pierre Hohenberg and records of the Office of Deputy Provost for Science and Technology at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 3-B (YRG 3-B), Records of Yale deputy, associate, and assistant provosts.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Office of the Deputy Provost, 2005-2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pierre Hohenberg, Deputy Provost for Science and Technology, Yale University, Records (RU 995). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of topical files maintained by Pierre Hohenberg and records of the Office of Deputy Provost for Science and Technology at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

did.unittitle: Robert A. Welch Award in Chemistry
Science Hill Phase II Task Force
Center for International and Area Studies
Deputy provost for science and technology records
Advisory Cmte of the Div of Phys Sciences
